news.summary: In an announcement today, it was revealed that the annual GDP growth rate for the fourth quarter of this year is estimated at 3.5%. This marks a significant increase from the previous quarter's growth rate of 2.1%. Additionally, the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, down from 5.0% in the previous quarter. These figures show a positive trend in the country's economic performance, with more jobs being created and a stronger GDP growth rate. It is a promising sign for the overall health of the economy and a potential boost for businesses and consumers alike.
news.headline: Impact of tariffs on North American freight discussed in "Odd Lots" segment. Learn more on Bloomberg.com.

news.summary: The world's largest asset manager has chosen to collaborate with the sole federally chartered digital bank in the United States.
news.headline: BlackRock chooses Anchorage Digital as custodian for Bitcoin & Ethereum ETF. Anchorage is the only federally chartered digital bank in the U.S.

news.summary: CF Industries Holdings, Inc., a major producer of ammonia, revealed a new joint venture with JERA Co., Inc. and Mitsui & Co., Inc. The collaboration aims to develop low-carbon ammonia. In this partnership, CF Industries will own 40% of the venture, while JERA and Mitsui will hold 35% and 25% respectively. JERA is renowned as Japan's largest energy firm, while Mitsui is a prominent global investment and trading entity. This strategic alliance focuses on the construction, production, and distribution of eco-friendly ammonia.
news.headline: CF Industries partners with JERA Co. & Mitsui for low-carbon ammonia; CF to hold 40%, JERA 35%, Mitsui undisclosed %.

news.summary: In Burleson, Texas, Corvias, a reputable infrastructure and resiliency partner for the U.S. military and higher education institutions, has appointed Kolby Stobbe as the new Senior Vice President of Property Operations. Stobbe will now supervise the company’s military housing portfolio, taking on a crucial role in Corvias Property Management leadership. In his new position, Stobbe will focus on creating organizational objectives, strategies, and systems to guarantee uniform and top-notch property operations.
news.headline: Corvias promotes Kolby Stobbe to oversee military housing portfolio as Senior VP of Property Operations.
US Trade Representative Greer: Too many countries are dependent on exports to the US.
US Trade Representative Greer: Port fees on Chinese ships are not all going to be implemented, they are not all going to be stacked.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, which is the lowest it has been in the past five years. The report also shows that over 250,000 new jobs were created in the last month alone. This decrease in the unemployment rate and the growth in job opportunities have been attributed to the government's economic policies and initiatives. Additionally, the report indicates that the average hourly wage has increased by 3.2% compared to last year. Experts believe that these positive economic indicators are a reflection of a strong and stable economy.
news.headline: Ukraine detains 2 Chinese fighters in Russia conflict.

Axios Reporter on X: Israel's Prime Minister Netanyahu in a video distributed by his office that a nuclear agreement with Iran would be acceptable to him only if it included the explosion of all of Iran's nuclear facilities and the dismantling of all equipment, under American supervision and by American execution. He noted that if this does not happen and Iran drags out the talks, a military option should be used.

news.summary: Hestan Commercial Corporation, a premium appliance brand for residential and commercial kitchen appliances, has recently partnered with Encompass Supply Chain Solutions. This exclusive strategic partnership designates Encompass as the authorized distributor for Hestan replacement parts and accessories in the U.S. Encompass, a division of Parts Town Unlimited, is a prominent provider of replacement parts and supply chain solutions. This collaboration ensures that Encompass will handle the distribution of warranty and non-warranty Hestan replacement parts and accessories across the country.
news.headline: Hestan Appliances partners with Encompass Supply Chain Solutions for replacement parts in U.S. and Canada, major strategic move for both companies.
US Trade Representative Greer: Any future trade agreements will need to have strong rules to avoid third countries like China from taking advantage of them.

news.summary: In Berlin, Camunda, a top provider of process orchestration and automation solutions, has unveiled enhanced agentic orchestration features aimed at assisting companies in integrating AI agents smoothly into their complete processes. Alongside this development, Camunda has introduced a range of AI-driven functionalities designed to optimize decision-making processes and streamline process creation. The goal is to assist organizations in harnessing the full capabilities of AI by incorporating it seamlessly into their overall operations, moving beyond individual applications for more holistic efficiency.
news.headline: Camunda introduces agentic orchestration for seamless integration of AI agents in processes and AI-powered features for decision making.

news.summary: Intelsat, a leading operator of satellite and terrestrial networks, has been chosen by A+E Networks Latin America to distribute premium entertainment content to millions of viewers in the region. Richard Kohlweg, Managing Sales Director of Media at Intelsat, expressed pride in the partnership, highlighting Intelsat's track record as a reliable provider of high-quality entertainment in Latin America. This collaboration reinforces Intelsat's commitment to delivering top-tier content to audiences in the region.
news.headline: A+E Latin America partners with Intelsat, delivering entertainment to millions in region. Trusted alliance strengthens reach.

news.summary: A new addition has been made to Terray Therapeutics' Scientific Advisory Board in Los Angeles. Dr. Elliott Levy, a Clinical Trial Expert, has joined the board to contribute his expertise. Terray Therapeutics, known for its work in AI Drug Discovery, aims to benefit from Dr. Levy's knowledge and experience. This recent development underscores the company's commitment to advancing in the field.
news.headline: Terray Therapeutics appoints Dr. Elliott Levy to Scientific Advisory Board, enhancing clinical trial expertise.

news.summary: In New York, Masttro, a prominent wealth tech provider for wealth owners and related industries, has appointed Dan Kutner as Head of Sales, North America. Kutner, known for his expertise in developing and leading fintech sales teams and fostering growth across various go-to-market areas, previously held the position of Executive Vice President of Sales at CircleBlack, a wealth tech firm. During his tenure at CircleBlack, he significantly contributed to shaping and implementing their growth strategies.
news.headline: Masttro names Dan Kutner Head of Sales, North America. Experienced in fintech, Kutner served as EVP of Sales at CircleBlack.

news.summary: During Heimar hf.'s Annual General Meeting on March 11, 2025, shareholders granted approval for the Board of Directors to buy back a maximum of 10% of the company's issued shares.
news.headline: Heimar hf. approved a share buy-back program at AGM, allowing the purchase of up to 10% of issued shares.

news.summary: Altera Corporation, a prominent figure in FPGA advancements, has unveiled Altera University in San Jose, California. This newly launched program aims to provide an accessible and cost-effective platform for introducing students to the field of FPGAs and digital logic programming. Altera University offers university professors, researchers, and students a wide array of pre-developed educational materials, software tools, and programmable hardware to enhance the learning process of FPGAs. The initiative seeks to expedite the learning curve in FPGA technology and equip individuals with essential skills.
news.headline: Altera launches Altera University to teach students FPGA skills. Program offers access to curricula, tools, and hardware.

news.summary: In a recent announcement from New York, Byldd has introduced innovative AI-powered solutions designed to assist entrepreneurs in progressing from concept to market-ready product within a remarkable timeframe of under 45 days.
news.headline: Byldd unveils AI tools to assist non-tech founders launch startups in under 45 days; accelerates idea-to-product process.

news.summary: In Santa Monica, California, Nimble, a Sales and Marketing engagement platform catering to small businesses, has garnered significant acclaim from key industry sources like G2, GetApp, and SoftwareReviews. The recognition highlights Nimble's excellence in user experience, customer satisfaction, and the new Nimble Email Marketing add-on. These awards spotlight Nimble's easy-to-use interface, outstanding customer satisfaction, and its growing reputation in the CRM space.
news.headline: Nimble CRM gets top awards for user satisfaction and growth, recognized by G2, GetApp, and SoftwareReviews.

news.summary: A company known as AUGA group, AB, with the code 126264360 and located at Konstitucijos ave. 21C in Vilnius is currently undergoing restructuring. It has recently released its 2025 investor calendar, which includes the planned release of the Consolidated audited annual information for 2024 on April 8. Furthermore, the company intends to announce details about the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders and its agenda. Unfortunately, the Consolidated audited annual information for the 2024 financial year will not be disclosed on the initially scheduled date.
news.headline: AUGA Group, AB delays publishing Consolidated audited annual info for 2024 to April 8, 2025. Ordinary General Meeting details also pending.
Italy's PM Meloni will head to the US to negotiate tariff relief directly with Trump - Sources.

news.summary: The price of Cardano's cryptocurrency ADA has risen by 3.14% in the last 24 hours, reaching $0.60. This increase contrasts with the 11.0% loss it faced over the past week, dropping from $0.68 to its current value. ADA's all-time high sits at $3.09. The comparison chart below illustrates the fluctuation in prices.
news.headline: Cardano's price rises by 3.14% in 24 hours to $0.60, opposite of its 11% loss over the past week. All-time high is $3.09.

news.summary: The U.S. Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) has announced a 5.06% average increase in government payments to Medicare Advantage plans for 2026. This is significantly higher than the previous estimate, which was 2.83 percentage points lower. The new effective growth rate is now at 9.04%, up from the earlier estimate of 5.93%. The increase is attributed to updated data on traditional Medicare spending, including figures from late 2024 that were not included in the earlier notice. This news comes as a promising development for Medicare Advantage and Medicare Part D prescription drug plans.
news.headline: Medicare Advantage rates expected to increase by 5.06% in 2026, easing pressure on managed care.

news.summary: The article discusses the scalability issues facing the Ethereum network due to the increasing popularity of DeFi and NFTs, with over $100 billion locked in DeFi and millions of NFTs being traded. It mentions that layer 2 solutions have been seen as a temporary fix but are not solving the scalability challenges effectively, leading to concerns regarding centralization and interoperability issues. Additionally, a new metric called "gas per second" is proposed to better evaluate blockchain performance compared to transactions per second. The article emphasizes the importance of focusing on improving layer 1 solutions rather than continuing to rely on layer 2 solutions to address Ethereum's scalability problems. The co-founder of Sei Labs suggests that layer 1s are the true solution to the scalability problem of the Ethereum Virtual Machine, and that a reevaluation of network performance metrics is crucial to achieving higher levels of scalability and efficiency.
news.headline: Layer 2 solutions aren't enough for EVM scalability. It costs $95.53M annually to run L2s. Reevaluating L1s might be the key.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Cerevance unveiled findings from its Phase 1 study of CVN293, a pioneering KCNK13 inhibitor designed to combat neuroinflammation. The trial demonstrated favorable tolerance of CVN293 in healthy individuals, both with single and multiple doses over 14 days, and displayed significant brain permeation. These results were disclosed during the American Academy of Neurology (AAN) 2025 Annual Meeting in San Diego. Cerevance is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm focusing on cell type-specific therapies for neurodegenerative, psychiatric, and central nervous system-directed metabolic conditions.
news.headline: Cerevance reports positive Phase 1 trial results for CVN293, targeting neuroinflammation at AAN 2025 Annual Meeting.

news.summary: The Board of LITGRID AB, with company code 302564383 and registered office at Karlo Gustavo Emilio Manerheimo g. 8, LT-05131, Vilnius, has decided to convene the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders at the same address, in hall No. 229. The meeting is scheduled for April 30, 2025, starting at 10:00 a.m.
news.headline: LITGRID AB convening Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders on 30 April 2025, at 10:00 a.m. at its office in Vilnius.

news.summary: The combined harvest volumes for the first quarter of 2025 are as follows: Farming Central Norway reported 21,100 tonnes, Farming Northern Norway yielded 19,300 tonnes, SalMar Ocean harvested 1,200 tonnes, and Icelandic Salmon contributed 1,100 tonnes. In total, there were 42,700 tonnes of fish caught during this quarter. All numbers are in 1,000 tonnes of gutted weight.
news.headline: SalMar reports Q1 2025 harvest volumes: 21.1k tonnes in Central Norway, 19.3k in Northern Norway, 1.2k in SalMar Ocean, and 1.1k in Icelandic Salmon. Total: 42.7k tonnes.
Effects of tariffs on North American freight causing prices to rise by up to 25%.

news.summary: Electricity transmission system operator LITGRID AB has released its financial statements, management report, and independent auditor’s report for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024. The company, with registration number 302564383 and headquarters at Karlo Gustavo Emilio Manerheimo str. 8 in Vilnius, Lithuania, disclosed the key figures and performance indicators as part of their annual reporting process.
news.headline: LITGRID AB releases audited financial statements and management report for year 2024, with company code 302564383.
Harvia Plc's Board of Directors decided on key matters at the meeting on 8 April 2025. #HarviaPlc #BoardMeeting

news.summary: Grigeo Group AB disclosed on April 4, 2025, that their upcoming Annual General Meeting of Shareholders is scheduled for April 28, 2025.
news.headline: Grigeo Group AB will hold its Annual General Meeting on April 28, 2025, as announced on April 4, 2025.
JP Morgan Structured Products B.V. is in the news with recent revenue of $10 billion.
US to sell $85 bln 4-week bills on April 10th, to settle on April 15th.

news.summary: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. This decline in unemployment has led to the creation of 250,000 new jobs in the past month alone, with the manufacturing and healthcare sectors experiencing the most growth. Additionally, wages have seen a 2.5% increase, providing some relief to workers. The positive trends in the job market have boosted consumer confidence, leading to increased spending and economic growth. The government is optimistic about the future outlook as they continue to focus on policies that support job creation and economic development.
news.headline: FDIC plans to relax banks’ living-will requirements, says acting chair. #finance #news

news.summary: Enphase Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) stocks have dipped as the company announced the release of its latest battery technology in Luxembourg. The IQ Battery 5P with FlexPhase is the most powerful and versatile battery offered by the company, catering to three-phase electrical setups commonly found in Luxembourg residences, providing reliable backup power. This new product, which initially offers 5 kWh capacity, follows its successful launch in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. The system can be configured with multiple units for higher capacity.
news.headline: Enphase Energy introduces IQ Battery 5P in Luxembourg, offering 15-year warranty. Supports 3-phase electrical systems and starts at 5 kWh capacity.

news.summary: Executives from cryptocurrency firms Messari and Sygnum are optimistic about institutional Bitcoin adoption in the latter half of 2025 despite the market turmoil caused by US trade tariffs. They predict a significant shift in the banking sector's involvement with crypto in the near future. Messari CEO Eric Turner and Sygnum Bank co-founder Thomas Eichenberger expect global banking interest in Bitcoin services to increase as regulators embrace cryptocurrencies. This push comes as regulatory bodies, including the SEC, show more openness towards crypto. Eichenberger also suggests that international banks with US branches are preparing to enter the market once the regulatory landscape becomes clearer. With clear crypto rules for banks, large international banks are expected to offer crypto-related services without fear of regulatory backlash. This panel discussion at Paris Blockchain Week highlighted the growing positive sentiment towards crypto adoption and regulatory acceptance within the banking sector.
news.headline: Crypto industry execs anticipate global banking to embrace Bitcoin by end of 2025, as regulators welcome crypto. Excitement for Q3 and Q4.

news.summary: In a joint announcement made by AMTD Group and The Generation Essentials Group, it has been revealed that Julia Michalska has been appointed as the Global Editor-in-Chief and Benjamin Sutton as the Editor-in-Chief, Americas, of The Art Newspaper. Founded in 1990, The Art Newspaper is a global art media company. Michalska and Sutton will join a global editorial committee responsible for overseeing the content and maintaining the quality of The Art Newspaper worldwide. The company, in existence for 35 years, is set to benefit from the new leadership appointments.
news.headline: AMTD Group appoints Julia Michalska as Global Editor-in-Chief & Benjamin Sutton as Editor-in-Chief, Americas for The Art Newspaper.

news.summary: Monaco displayed its increasing involvement in space exploration through various events that included prominent figures in the industry.
news.headline: Monaco demonstrates key role in space exploration with signature events, highlighting leaders in industry.

news.summary: Global stock markets rebounded following a decline triggered by President Trump's tariffs, with China introducing fresh initiatives to boost its markets. This led to a recovery in stock prices worldwide after they had initially experienced a drop due to the tariffs imposed by President Trump. The measures implemented by China contributed to the improvement in market conditions, helping to offset some of the losses incurred earlier. Investors responded positively to these developments, leading to an overall recovery in stock values across different countries.
news.headline: Global stocks bounce back after President Trump's tariffs, as China unveils measures to boost markets.

news.summary: ZKcandy, a product of iCandy Interactive and Matter Labs, is an Ethereum layer-2 network that specifically targets mobile gaming.
news.headline: New Ethereum Gaming Network ZKcandy launched, including 'Pepe Kingdom.' Built by iCandy Interactive & Matter Labs, it targets mobile gaming.
